---
title: "Contact"
---



I am happy to discuss stochastic thermodynamics, nonequilibrium statistical physics, scientific visualization and possible collaborations.

## Links

- Email 1: iagomamede@usp.br
- Email 2: iago.nascimento@uhasselt.br
- Email 3: iagomamede9@gmail.com
- [GitHub](https://github.com/iagomamede)
- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=IzlSrFEAAAAJ&hl=en)
- [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0003-2380-4012)
